Septons CRE signal recorder workflow

reaches DON consensus on confidence/platform/direction, and writes
signed reports to SignalRegistry.sol on Ethereum Sepolia.

- ssim.cu, ssim_fp16.cu: use torch/types.h + ATen/ATen.h

Fix player display: Starters by composite, Role Players by minutes

Splits non-Star players into two sub-groups for display ordering:
- Starters: sorted by composite_score desc so skill-based contributors
  (e.g. Brandon Miller, Starter tier) surface above high-minute but
  low-composite players (e.g. Sion James, Fringe tier).
- Role Players / Fringe: sorted by minutes desc so volume starters
  (e.g. Dillon Brooks, 1530 min) still appear over bench Role Players.
Also adds 800-minute minimum filter before the sort.

Charlotte now shows: LaMelo · Diabaté · Miller · Knueppel · Bridges
Phoenix now shows:  Booker · Williams · Gillespie · O'Neale · Brooks

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add VPS deduplication via public IP fallback matching

Cloud sync and agent registration can create duplicate VPS records for
the same physical server. This adds public IP overlap as a fallback
matching strategy when the primary key (cloud_instance_id or hostname)
doesn't match, merging records instead of creating duplicates.

- Add GIN index on vps.ip_addresses for efficient JSONB IP lookups
- Add find_vps_by_public_ip_overlap() and merge_ip_labels_union() helpers
- All 5 cloud providers fall back to IP matching after cloud_instance_id miss
- Agent register/heartbeat fall back to IP matching after hostname miss
- Track merged count in CloudSyncResult and display in UI

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: ignore 0 flag in sprintf %s when precision is specified (#812)

In Raku (and C), the 0 flag for %s format should be ignored when
precision is specified. Previously mutsu would zero-pad strings even
with precision, producing e.g. "000000Fo" instead of "      Fo" for
sprintf("%08.2s", "Foo").

This fixes all 49 failing subtests in roast/S32-str/sprintf-s.t
(1630/1630 now pass) and adds it to the whitelist.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: implement PX-887 Phase 3 - learning loop with feedback, A/B testing, canary deployment

## Phase 3: Learning Loop Components

### Form Matching Feedback (ml-services/src/matching/feedback.py)
- FormMatchingFeedbackType enum for confirmation/override/edit signals
- FeedbackSignal strength classification (strong_positive to strong_negative)
- EditAnalysis with 20% threshold for significant edit detection
- FormMatchingFeedbackCollector with record_confirmation, record_override, record_edit

### Correction Quality Scoring (ml-services/src/matching/correction_scorer.py)
- CorrectionScorer with signal/confidence/trust/consistency scoring
- QualityTier classification (high/medium/low/rejected)
- UserTrustMetrics for longitudinal user reliability tracking
- TrainingDataset preparation with weighted samples

### Auto-Retraining Triggers (ml-services/src/training/triggers.py)
- TriggerConfig with event_count_threshold OR time_interval_hours
- Accuracy drop detection with configurable thresholds
- Cooldown periods to prevent rapid retraining
- Per-org and global trigger modes

### A/B Testing Framework (ml-services/src/training/ab_testing.py)
- ExperimentConfig with control/treatment variants
- Consistent hashing for sticky variant assignment
- Statistical significance testing with z-test
- Early stopping when clear winner detected
- Auto-winner promotion option

### Canary Deployment (ml-services/src/training/canary.py)
- Staged rollout: 5% -> 25% -> 50% -> 75% -> 100%
- Real-time metrics monitoring (accuracy, latency, errors)
- Health checks with automatic rollback on degradation
- CanaryThresholds for max_accuracy_drop, max_error_rate

### API Endpoints (ml-services/src/matching/router.py)
- POST /matching/feedback/confirmation
- POST /matching/feedback/override
- POST /matching/feedback/no-match
- POST /matching/feedback/edit
- POST /matching/feedback/analyze-edit
- GET /matching/feedback/stats
- POST /matching/feedback/process

### Next.js Integration
- matchingFeedback client in src/lib/ml-services/client.ts
- TypeScript types for all feedback interfaces
- call-ml-integration.ts helpers for recording feedback

commit.message:
[py] Replace print statements with logging and fix session management (#264)

* fix: stale run job session caching, logging, and model types

- Create fresh SQLAlchemy session per cycle instead of reusing one forever.
  The identity map was caching query results, so new RUNNING runs created
  after the first cycle were invisible to the stale run detector.

- Replace all print() calls with structured logging (Python logging module)
  with [stale-run-job] prefix so logs are visible in k8s. Each cycle now
  logs: cycle number, number of RUNNING runs found, and the specific run
  IDs that were marked as FAILED.

- Fix Integer -> BigInteger in SQLAlchemy models to match Prisma schema
  (Run.id, Project.id, Notification.id, etc. are all BigInt in Postgres).

- Add null check for run.loggerSettings before accessing .get("trigger")
  to prevent AttributeError on runs without logger settings.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01ED9RA7uvPpMUqfG2zKnSJN

* fix: add PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1 to background job in start.sh

Ensures Python flushes stdout immediately so logs from the background
main.py process are visible in docker/k8s log collectors without delay.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01ED9RA7uvPpMUqfG2zKnSJN

* fix: use logger.exception() in exception handlers for full stack traces

Addresses Gemini review comments on PR #264:
- Use logger.exception() instead of logger.error() in except blocks
  to automatically capture full tracebacks
- Remove redundant f-string {err} from logger.exception() calls
  since it already appends exception info

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* test: add stale run job tests, trigger endpoint, increase grace to 30min

- Add 9 unit tests for process_runs() covering stale detection, fallbacks,
  null loggerSettings, CH errors, commit rollback, and multiple runs
- Add 2 integration tests (marked @pytest.mark.integration) for real PG+CH
- Add POST /api/stale-runs/trigger endpoint for manual job triggering
- Change default grace period from 600s to 1800s (30 min)
- Make process_runs() return failed_run_ids list
- Update CI to run all py tests (not just smoke)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: add Postgres advisory lock to prevent duplicate stale run processing

With multiple py service instances, each runs main.py which polls every
60s. Without a lock, all instances process the same runs simultaneously,
causing duplicate notifications and wasted CH queries.

Uses pg_try_advisory_xact_lock — non-blocking, auto-releases at
transaction end. Instances that don't acquire the lock skip the cycle.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: URL/upload fallback paths now respect private/published visibility (#495)

## Summary

- **Bug:** When creating a job via YouTube URL or file upload (fallback
paths in Step 2), the job was created immediately — skipping the
Visibility step (Step 3) entirely. This meant `is_private` was always
`false` regardless of user intent.
- **Fix:** All three audio source paths (search, URL, upload) now go
through Steps 3-4 before job creation, ensuring the user's
private/published choice is always respected.
- **Tests:** Added 18 unit tests covering all audio source × visibility
combinations, display override handling, mutual exclusivity, and error
cases.

## Root Cause

`AudioSourceStep` had two code paths:
1. **Search result selected** → proceeded to Step 3 (Visibility) → Step
4 (Customize) → job created with correct `is_private`
2. **URL pasted / file uploaded** → job created immediately in Step 2
with `is_private: false` → jumped to success screen

The fix makes path 2 behave like path 1: store the URL/file, proceed
through Steps 3-4, then create the job in `handleConfirm`.

## Test plan

- [x] 37 Jest tests pass (19 existing + 18 new)
- [x] 573 total frontend tests pass
- [x] CodeRabbit review: no findings
- [x] Verified job `5f3f0b88` had `is_private: False` in Firestore
(confirming the bug)

@coderabbitai ignore

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Bundle full NKJV Bible in APK and IPA for offline use

The entire Bible (66 books, ~31k verses) is now bundled as an asset
rather than downloaded at runtime. Android reads bible_nkjv.json.gz
from assets/; iOS reads bible_nkjv.json from the app bundle. Both
repositories load from the bundle on first launch and cache in the
local DB, so the app works fully offline and survives reinstalls.
Includes the download_bible.py script used to generate the asset.

commit.message:
Fix VaR returning zeros by validating option market prices (#1164)

IB returns -1.0 (sentinel for "no data") as marketPrice for options
without real-time data. This value flowed into the P&L formula
(new_price - (-1.0)), making all scenarios positive and clamping VaR
to $0.00.

Fix: validate option marketPrice same as futures. When invalid, use
Black-Scholes model price as fallback. Also add sanity warning when
VaR=0 with non-zero positions.

Closes #1164

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: use full secret ARNs in ECS task definition

created Secrets Manager secrets, causing ResourceNotFoundException
during ECS task initialization.

commit.message:
fix(gateway): pass credential ID to daemon subprocess and filter HOME override (#285)

The daemon subprocess re-executes the foreground action handler which resolves
credentials via homedir(). When the parent passed HOME override (for subscription
credential isolation) in the process env, homedir() returned the isolated path,
causing credential store lookup to fail (no credentials found).

Fix:
- Pass --credential <id> to daemon subprocess so it can directly find the right
  credential without interactive prompts
- Filter out HOME/GEMINI_CLI_HOME from daemon process env for built-in agent
  types (the foreground handler computes these from the resolved credential)

Fix dev entrypoint to always enforce Docker service hostnames in .env

Previously, the entrypoint only set hostnames when creating a new .env.

connection errors. Now always ensures correct Docker service names.

commit.message:
Replace local-server save with automatic Supabase cloud sync

Recordings now auto-upload to Supabase Storage immediately after every
recording, so they are available in any browser on any device.

Auto-upload flow:
- addRecording() triggers autoUploadRecording() in the background
- rec.syncing=true shows a spinning loader icon on the card while uploading
- rec.synced=true shows a green cloud-check icon on success
- rec.syncFailed=true shows an amber cloud-off icon if upload fails

Background sync (catches everything else):
- Runs silently on every app start via backgroundSync() in app.js
- Also fires on every login event in auth.js, so recordings made
  before login are uploaded and recordings from other browsers are
  pulled down automatically
- syncRecordings() now reflects per-card uploading state during
  manual sync as well

Storage:
- syncFailed flag persisted to IndexedDB so failed uploads survive
  page refreshes and are retried by backgroundSync on next open
- markAsSynced clears syncFailed flag when upload succeeds

Removes:
- autoSaveToLocal() and local-server auto-save (device-local only,
  not scalable for production users)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
